upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prADyAyad garuqaM hariH' (hari॰10.3.81) sasmAretyarTaH
'kfzRaH pradaDyO yaduvIramuKyaH' (BA॰Adi॰187.9)
'mayEtannAma praDyAtaM manasA SocatA' (BA॰u॰113.10) cintAvizayatAM nItam
'nApaDyAyenna spfhayennAbadDaM cintayedasat' (BA॰SAM॰215.9) parasyAnizwaM na cintayedityAha
'apaGyAsyanti me deva' (BA॰droRa॰54.4)
'aDarmaste na BavitA nApaGyAsyAmyahaM SuBe' (BA॰droRa॰54.39)
'tadA BImaM hfdA rAjannApaGyAsyati saH' (BA॰15.61)
'apaGyAtA ca vipreRa nyapatad DaraRItale' (BA॰vana॰206.5)
'apaGyAto mahendro hi muninA devaSarmaRA asyAkANkzAtpurA BAryAm' (hari॰2.72.64)
'apaGyAtA BagavatA mahAdevena DImatA (prajAH)' (hari॰1.3.4) uktacaro'rTo na punarvacanamapekzate 'apaGyAnena sA tena DUmAruRasamapraBA' (BA॰Adi॰232.29)
'muhUrttamiva sandaDyO kimayaM codyatAmiti' (BA॰saBA॰1.8) sandaDyO=cicinta praRihitamanAH
'tAmavekzya tataH krudDaH samapaDyAyata dvijaH' (BA0 vana0 2064) apaDyAnamityaSivasya cintanam tadeva samapaDyAnam anuDyAnApaDyAne viroDinI
'ato'nuktezu yA nArI samaBiDyAti dOhfdam' (suSruta0 132315) saspfhaM smaratItyAha
'nirDyAyato'niSam suDAsUtikalAmOlim' (rAja0 1279) nirDyAyataH=nirantaraM DyAyataScintayataH
'taM (garutmantaM) nidaDO raGUttamaH' (Bawwi0 1465) cintayAmAsa sasmAra manasA jagAma
'Arye kimidAnIM mAmapahasitumiva niDyAyasi' (svapna0 2) niDyAyasi cintayasi
'upa vE SuSrUzate niDyAyati' (E0 brA0 32) niDyAyati nirvarRayati
'vyAcakzaRasya tu me nidiDyAsasva' (Sa0 14544) nidiDyAsasva=avaDatsva avahitaScintaya
'tasmAtkumAraM jAtaM saMvadanta upa vE SuSrUzate ni vE DyAyatIti' (E0 brA0 32) pAWakArtsnyAyehAnuvAdaH arTastu nirdizwacaraH
'taM sUtikAgfhanivizwamaTo nidaDyuH' (Sa0 di0 vi0 281) nidaDyuH=dadfSuH
'ni tvA yajYasya sADanam agne hotAramftvijam vanuzvad deva DImahi' (tE0 brA0 27126) niDImahi nitarAM DyAyema
'tato'tiDyAyatastasya jajYire mAnasIH prajAH' (mUrasaMskftapAWAvalyAM vAyupurARavAkyam) atiDyAyato DyAna-nimagnasya
'taM (somaM) devASca fzayaScAByaDyAyan kaTamayamasmAn somo rAjAgacCediti' (E0 brA0 127) aByaDyAyan nirantaramacintayan
'tAsAM rohiRImaByaDyAyat' (tE0 bA0 3142)
'yA vE SrIraByaDyAsizamimAstAH' (Sa0 brA0 6217) uditacara evArTaH
'yaM yaM devamaBiDyAyed Baktiyuktena cetasA' (varAha pu0 16940) pUrveRa samo'rTaH
'prajApatirvE svAM duhitaramaByaDyAyat divamityanya Ahuruzasamityanye' (E0 brA0 333) BAryAtvena DyAnamakaroditi sAyaRaH
'prajApatirvE svAM duhitaramaBidaDyO divaM vozasaM vA tAM sambaBUva' (Sa0 brA0 1741) aBidaDyO cakame kAmayAYcakra ityarTaH
'agnirha tA apo'BidaDyO miTunyABiH syAmiti' (Sa0 brA0 2115)
'imASca kAme'rTe'BiDyAyaterdiSaH kAScana dfSyAH-- somo vE rAjA diSo'ByaDyAyat sa diSo'nuprAviSat' (tE0 saM0 64418)
'yajYo dakziRAmaByaDyAyad' (tE0 saM0 61322)
'sa punarimaM lokamaByaDyAyat' (tE0 saM0 1594)
'Apo varuRasya patnaya Asan tA agniraByaDyAyat' (tE0 brA0 1138)
'tA (apaH) agniraByaDyAyat' (tE0 brA0 1138) iti
'AdvAramanuvavrAja maNgalAnyaBidaDyuzI' (rA0 21621) aBiDyAyantItyarTaH iha parArTasya satfzRaM cintanaM nArTaH cintanamAtraM tvarTaH
'sa yadyenaM manasA'BiDyAtaH yajYo nopanamet' (Sa0 brA0 12613) aBiDyAtaH saMkalpitaH cintitaH
'so'BiDyAya SarIrAt svAt sisfkzurviviDAH prajAH' (manu0 18) aBiDyAya vicintya
'taTA tadanaBiDyeyaM vAkyaM yAdavanandana' (BA0 SAM0 4627) anaBiDyeyam avicAraRIyam
'aBiDyopadeSAcca' (brahma sU0 1424) aBiDyA=icCA
'na cAcikIrzItparavastvaBiDyAm' (budDa0 244) mamedamastviti saNkalpo'BiDyA
'aBiDyA vE praTamaM hanti lokAn' (BA0 u0 4211) aBiDyA vizayasmaraRam
'kAmABiDyA svaSarIraM dunoti' (BA0 u0 265) kAmABiDyA vizayaDyAnam aBiDyA tu parasya vizaye spfhetyamaraH
'anaBiDyA parasvezu sarvasattvezu sOhfdam' (BA0 anu0 135) anaBiDyA'loBa
'aBiDyA'praKyatA cEva sarvaM loBAtpravartate' (BA0 SAM0 1585) aBiDyA cintA dOrmanasyam
'ISvarastamanugfhRAtyaBiDyAnamAtreRa' (yogasUtre 123 BAzye)
'paradravyezvaBiDyAnam' (manu0 125) paraDanamanyAyena gfhRAmItyevaM cintanam
'yo nirvadeta saMmohAd brAhmaRaM vedapAragam so'BiDyAnAd brAhmaRasya parABUyAdasaM Sayam' (BA0 SAM0 32750-51).. aBiDyAnAt SApAd anuvyAhArAt
'taM SabdamaBiniDyAya' (rA0 1287) tatra Sabde manaH praRiDAya Alakzyeti katakaH katakawIkAyAM 12628 ityatra pAWaH
'suparRo'TAbravId vipraM pratiDyAtaM mayA dvija' (BA0 u0 1138) praDyAtaM vE mayA dvijeti pAWAntaram pratiDyAtaM DyAtaM cintitam
